title: Xanthones that decrease lipid production in sebocytes
abstract: The present invention relates to xanthone compounds for use in a method of decreasing lipid production in sebocytes; to compositions comprising at least such a compound; to the use of such a composition for decreasing lipid production in sebocytes; and to a cosmetic method for decreasing lipid production in sebocytes. In some embodiments, the compound is selected from the group consisting of a-mangostin and y-mangostin.
claims:
Claims 1. A compound according to Chemical Formula (I) wherein, in Chemical Formula (I), R 1 , R 2 , R 3 , R 4 , R 5 , R 6 , R 7 , and R 8 are each independently selected from the group consisting of halogen, FI, OH, COOH, SH, C1-C10 (hetero)alkyl, C2-C10 (hetero)alkenyl, C3-C6 (hetero)cycloalkyl, and C3-C6 (hetero)cycloalkenyl; or a pharmaceutically or cosmetically acceptable salt, prodrug, solvate, tautomer or stereoisomer thereof, for use in a method of decreasing lipid production in sebocytes. 2. The compound for use according to claim 1 , wherein, in Chemical Formula (I), R 1 , R 2 , R 3 , R 4 , R 5 , R 6 , R 7 , and R 8 are each independently selected from the group consisting of halogen, H, OH, SH, C1 -C5 (hetero)alkyl, and C2-C5 (hetero)alkenyl. 3. The compound for use according to claim 1 or 2, wherein R 1 , R 2 , R 3 , R 4 , R 5 , R 6 , R 7 , and R 8 are not all H. 4. The compound for use according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein R 1 and/or R 7 represent the group CH 2 CH=C(CH 3 ) 2 . 5. The compound for use according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein the compound is a compound according to Chemical Formula (II) wherein, in Chemical Formula (II), R 11 , R 12 , R 13 , R 16 , R 17 , and R 18 are each independently selected from the group consisting of OH, SH, C1 -C5 (hetero)alkyl, and C2-C5 (hetero)alkenyl, preferably selected from the group consisting of OH, OCH 3 , and unsubstituted, linear or branched C2-C5 alkenyl. 6. The compound for use according to claim 5, wherein R 11 , R 12 , R 13 , R 16 , R 17 , and R 18 are each independently selected from the group consisting of OH, SH, OCH 3 , OCF 3 , and C3-C5 alkenyl. 7. The compound for use according to claim 6, wherein the compound is a compound according to Chemical Formula (III) wherein, in Chemical Formula (III), R 22 , R 23 , R 26 , and R 28 are each independently selected from the group consisting of OH, SH,OCH 3 , and OCF 3 . 8. The compound for use according to any one of claims 1 to 7, wherein the compound is selected from the group consisting of a-mangostin and y-mangostin. 9. The compound for use according to any one of claims 1 to 8, wherein the method is the treatment of a skin disease or disorder related to increased lipid production in sebocytes. 10. The compound for use according to claim 9, wherein the skin disease or disorder related to increased lipid production in sebocytes is selected from the group consisting of oily skin, shiny skin, skin having whiteheads and/or blackheads, skin having enlarged pores, and acne. 1 1 . Composition comprising at least one compound as defined in any one of claims 1 to 8 and at least one cosmetically acceptable carrier. 12. The composition according to claim 11 , wherein the composition is a topical composition; and/or cosmetic composition; and/or dermatological composition. 13. The composition according to claim 11 or claim 12, wherein the at least one compound as defined in any one of claims 1 to 8 is present in an amount of at least about 0.05 wt.-%, preferably in an amount of at least about 0.1 wt.-%, based on the total weight of the composition. 14. The composition according to claim any one of claims 1 1 to 13, wherein the at least one compound as defined in any one of claims 1 to 8 is present in an amount of about 0.05 to 50 wt.-%, preferably in an amount of about 0.1 to 40 wt.-%, more preferably in an amount of about 0.1 to 30 wt.- 

 %, even more preferably in an amount of about 0.5 to 25 wt.-%, based on the total weight of the composition. 15. The composition according to any one of claims 11 to 14, wherein the composition further comprises at least one skin benefit agent. 16. The composition according to any one of claims 11 to 15, wherein the skin benefit agent is selected from the group consisting of moisturizing agents, antimicrobial agents, anti-inflammatory agents, antioxidants, UV absorbing agents, anti-acne agents, skin pigmentation-inducing agents, and skin pigmentation-blocking agents. 17. The composition according to any one of claims 11 to 16, wherein the composition further comprises at least one component selected from the group consisting of surfactants, solvents, sequestering agents, thickeners, fragrances, pH adjusters, preservatives, dyes, pigments, and opacifiers. 18. The composition according to any one of claims 11 to 17, wherein the composition is a skin cleanser, toner, serum, lotion, cream, emulsion, gel, make-up composition (foundation, make-up, powder), skin mask, hair mask, shampoo, or conditioner. 19. The composition according to any one of claims 11 to 18, wherein the composition is for decreasing lipid production in sebocytes. 20. Use of a composition according to any one of claims 11 to 19 for decreasing lipid production in sebocytes. 21. A cosmetic method for decreasing lipid production in sebocytes or in the skin of an individual in need thereof, comprising contacting said sebocyte or skin with lipid production-decreasing amount of at least one compound as defined in any one of claims 1 to 8 or composition according to any one of claims 11 to 19.
